zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡整理，待突破关键区间
zh.content:
目前，ETH/USD的价格维持在2149.66附近，呈现出短期震荡整理的格局。从价格走势来看，当前高点2156.08与低点2122.66之间的波动范围较为有限，表明市场暂时缺乏明确的方向性。短期内，若突破2156.08的阻力位，有可能开启上行趋势；若跌破2122.66的支撑位，则可能进一步回调。

在技术指标方面，RSI(14)数据缺失，暂时无法评估是否出现超买或超卖情况。MACD值为18.52363，虽然没有提供信号线数据，但这一数值相对较高，显示出市场存在一定的买盘动能。SMA(20)在2091.96，若价格回调至此附近，将为潜在的支撑区域。

从支撑和阻力位来看，2122.66为近期的关键支撑位，若价格持续在此之上整理，则可能继续维持震荡。若突破2156.08，市场可能会测试更高的价格水平，甚至挑战2200美元。若跌破支撑位2122.66，则可能出现短期下行风险，目标可能下探2080美元。

交易建议方面，建议在突破2156.08时进行多头布局，止损位设在2122.66附近。而若价格跌破2122.66支撑位，则建议暂时观望，避免下行风险。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading at $2149.66, showing a modest 1.28% gain over the past 24 hours. Price action suggests a short-term bullish trend, as the latest value sits above the 20-day simple moving average of $2091.96. The intraday high of $2156.08 indicates resistance near the $2160 level, while the low of $2122.66 serves as immediate support. Momentum appears to favor buyers, though the narrow range signals a potential consolidation before a decisive breakout.  

The MACD reading of 18.52363, though lacking a signal line for full confirmation, suggests that bullish momentum is present. Traders should watch for a potential MACD crossover above a derived signal to reinforce upward momentum. Conversely, a downward MACD shift could indicate weakening momentum, possibly testing the $2120 support zone. Price stability above the 20-day SMA strengthens the likelihood of a continuation toward the $2180–$2200 resistance range in the near term.  

Support and resistance analysis highlights $2120 as a crucial floor for risk management. Breaching this level could open a retest of the $2090–$2100 SMA zone. On the upside, $2160–$2180 marks the immediate supply barrier, where profit-taking and increased selling pressure may occur. A decisive break above this level would target the $2200–$2220 range, offering attractive entry points for trend-following strategies. Traders should monitor volume to confirm the strength of any breakout.  

Given current conditions, short-term trading favors cautious long positions while maintaining protective stops near $2120. Momentum-based entries can target minor rallies toward $2160–$2180, with partial profit-taking recommended at resistance. Conservative traders may wait for a confirmed breakout above $2180 to enter, while aggressive participants could consider scaling in around the 20-day SMA. Monitoring MACD evolution and price interaction with SMA will be key to adjusting positions effectively.
